name: Pasta with Garlic & Olive Oil
recipeInstructions:
VERSION 1: With raw garlic
1. Combine the garlic with the olive oil.
2. Cook the spaghetti until it is al dente, then drain and toss with the garlic and olive oil.
3. Season well and serve immediately.
VERSION 2: With lightly toasted golden garlic
1. Heat the garlic in the olive oil until golden.
2. Remove from the heat and set aside.
3. Cook the spaghetti until al dente, then drain and toss with the garlic.
4. Season and serve immediately.
Variations using Version 2:
- Add a generous pinch of hot red pepper flakes as you heat the garlic. Toss with the cooked pasta and a handful or two of chopped fresh parsley.
- Prepare the basic recipe, adding parsley as above. Season with lots of cayenne pepper and toss with the finely grated rind of 1 lime and the juice of 1 or 2 limes. Also good with lemon.
- Add several teaspoonfuls of capers to the hot pepper variation.
- Add a small handful of torn basil leaves to the oil as you heat the garlic.
- Coarsely chop half a head of white cabbage and add it to the pan along with the heating garlic and hot red pepper flakes. Saute until tender and slightly browned. Add more oil, garlic, and red pepper if needed. Season and toss with pasta of your choice.
